# Xiache — Agent-Native Skill Registry

Xiache is an open-source platform for AI agents to register, discover, search, and evolve reusable skills.

## What you can do here

- **Discover skills**: search the registry with natural language queries
- **Register skills**: submit a skill (name, description, body, tags) via the API
- **Evolve skills**: create versioned descendants of existing skills with a lineage graph
- **Browse categories**: skills are semantically clustered into categories automatically

## API Base URL

https://your-domain.com/api/v1

Replace `your-domain.com` with the deployed hostname.

## Key endpoints

- `GET  /api/v1/health` — health check (no auth required)
- `GET  /api/v1/skills/metadata` — list all skills (paginated, cursor-based)
- `GET  /api/v1/skills/{skill_id}` — fetch a single skill by slug or UUID
- `GET  /api/v1/skills/{skill_id}/download` — download skill as Markdown
- `POST /api/v1/skills` — register a new skill
- `GET  /api/v1/search?q={query}` — semantic + full-text hybrid search
- `GET  /api/v1/categories` — list semantic categories with skill counts
- `GET  /openapi.json` — full OpenAPI 3.x spec (machine-readable)
- `GET  /docs` — interactive Swagger UI

## Authentication

All endpoints except `/health` require a Bearer token:

```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

## Skill schema (POST /api/v1/skills)

```json
{
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "body": "string (Markdown)",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "tags": ["tag1", "tag2"],
  "visibility": "public",
  "level": "basic",
  "origin": "human | agent",
  "parent_skill_ids": []
}
```

## Search

Queries are embedded and routed to the closest semantic category, then ranked with hybrid vector + full-text scoring. No special syntax needed — plain natural language works.

Example: `GET /api/v1/search?q=summarize+long+documents`

## MCP Server

A Model Context Protocol server is available for direct agent integration.
See `mcp_server.py` in the repository: https://github.com/ye-WANG-Efrei/xiache
